body: There have been multiple reports of labor unions and other groups storming factories and forcing on-duty workers to join strikes.

title: Freeport Indonesia Delivers First Gold Bars to Antam to Mark New Milestone
body: Freeport becomes Indonesia’s first fully integrated mining company, capable of refining anodes from impure metals into gold bars.
